summary: GH-100 spec is approved for a minimal static package lock contract. The spec keeps scope limited to a package-local lock asset, manifest/local registry/lifecycle metadata alignment, and offline validator consumption, and explicitly excludes App install/update, hosted registry, Core Run Record/result envelope, runtime execution, Core fixture consumption, and write guardrail behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: Spec review consumed `.loom/specs/GH-100/spec.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-100/plan.md`, `.loom/specs/GH-100/implementation-contract.md`, and `.loom/specs/GH-100/task-carrier.md`; `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-100 --json` and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-100 --json` passed.
follow_ups: GH-101 through GH-103 must cover sample read package closeout, Core fixture consumption, and deferred write guardrail.
